popularStory.headline: Mistress of King Henry VIII
popularStory.description: Mary Berkeley, a mistress of King Henry VIII was reported to have had two sons Thomas Stucley and John Perrot both of whom were rumoured to be illegitimate children of Henry. While pregnant with her s …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary Anne Berkeley於1503年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Sir James Berkeley37歲，母親Lady Susan FitzAlan28歲。她於大約1505年與Thomas Brewer在英國英格蘭肯特韋斯特 法爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1586年3月2日在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年83歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾雷可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary Anne Berkeley于1503年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Sir James Berkeley37岁，母亲Lady Susan FitzAlan28岁。她于大约1505年与Thomas Brewer在英国英格兰肯特韋斯特 法爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1586年3月2日在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年83岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾雷可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary Anne Berkeley was born in 1503, in Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir James Berkeley, was 37 and her mother, Lady Susan FitzAlan, was 28. She married Thomas Brewer about 1505, in West Farleigh, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 2 March 1586, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Rendcomb, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary Anne Berkeley est née en 1503, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Berkeley, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Susan FitzAlan, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Brewer environ 1505, à West Farleigh, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 2 mars 1586, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Rendcomb, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary Anne Berkeley 1503 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Berkeley 37 und ihre Mutter Lady Susan FitzAlan 28. Sie hat um 1505 in West Farleigh, Kent, England, United Kingdom Thomas Brewer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 2. März 1586 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Rendcomb, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Anne Berkeley è nata il nel 1503 nel Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir James Berkeley, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Lady Susan FitzAlan, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Brewer circa 1505, nel West Farleigh, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 2 marzo 1586, nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Rendcomb, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Anne Berkeleyが1503年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir James Berkeleyは37歳，母Lady Susan FitzAlanは28歳であった。約1505年にイギリスイギリスケントウエスト ファルレイグでThomas Brewerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1586年3月2日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで83歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレンドコンブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Anne Berkeley(이)가 1503년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Berkeley(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Susan FitzAlan(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 웨스트 패를리에서 Thomas Brewer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1586년 3월 2일 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 렌드코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Anne Berkeley nasceu em 1503, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James Berkeley, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Susan FitzAlan, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Brewer aproximadamente 1505, em West Farleigh, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 2 de março de 1586, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Rendcomb, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary Anne Berkeley родилась в 1503 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir James Berkeley было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Susan FitzAlan, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Brewer около 1505 г. в местности вест фарлиг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 2 марта 1586 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности рендкомб, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Mary Anne Berkeley nació en 1503, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir James Berkeley, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Susan FitzAlan, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Thomas Brewer aproximadamente 1505, en West Farleigh, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 2 de marzo de 1586, en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Rendcomb, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
